title: NLP deep dive: IE, multilingual, code generation
focus: Span-based IE; XLM-R; StarCoder / Code Llama.

items.label: Information extraction (NER, RE, OpenIE)
interviewQuestions: Compare span-based vs sequence-tagging IE — when does each win?
How would you design a relation-extraction system that handles entities not seen in training?

items.label: Multilingual & low-resource NLP
interviewQuestions: How does mBERT/XLM-R enable cross-lingual transfer, and where does it break?
What's the curse of multilinguality, and how do you mitigate it for low-resource languages?

items.label: Code generation: Codex, StarCoder, Code Llama
interviewQuestions: How is training a code model different from training a natural-language model?
How would you evaluate a code generation model — pass@k, HumanEval, SWE-bench?

items.label: Encoder-only vs decoder-only vs encoder-decoder for NLP products
interviewQuestions: When would you choose BERT-style encoder-only models over GPT-style decoder-only models?
When is encoder-decoder still the cleanest choice for summarization, translation, or extraction?
How would latency and serving cost affect that architecture choice?
